description: APInf is an open-source API management platform associated with the FIWARE ecosystem. Its published documentation focuses on installing and self-hosting the platform and integrating it with an API Umbrella proxy.
summary: apinf.org does not expose a discoverable public developer integration surface on its own domain; available documentation only points to the APInf open-source/self-hosted platform and mentions a programmatic API without publishing a public endpoint or machine-readable spec.
